snippet: Charge overconsumption Velo bikes Dear Denys, Customer number: 2580415 For the use of the shared bikes of Velo Antwerp we charge €1,5 via the payment method linked to your annual subscription. The
subject: Auto-mailer: Charge overconsumption Velo bikes
body:
Dear Denys,

Customer number: 2580415

For the use of the shared bikes of Velo Antwerp we charge €1,5 via the payment method linked to your annual subscription.

The first 30 minutes are always included per ride. As a ride was not completed within 30 minutes, we charge this extra cost according to our rates.

Log in to your user zone in the Velo app or at www.velo-antwerpen.be for more info.

Your user name: denisvalerievichmayorov1@gmail.com

Best regards.
The Velo team.

Velo Antwerpen/ Service2Cities is committed to protecting your Personal Data. The way we do that is changing in line with European legislation. Please check our updated Privacy Notice on www.velo-antwerpen.be. You can always update your preferences at any time in the user zone.
